Full job description
Are you a driven, highly organised professional looking for a role where you can make a real impact and see results quickly?

This is an exciting opportunity to join a growing, forward-thinking fostering agency where your work genuinely changes lives. At Evergreen Foster Care, we’re not just building a service, we’re building futures for children and families.

We’re looking for an ambitious, detail-focused Business Manager who thrives in a fast-paced environment and wants to be at the heart of a purpose-led organisation. If you’re someone who takes ownership, delivers results, and wants to grow with a company, this role is for you.

What You’ll Be Doing:

You’ll play a key role in supporting the Registered Manager, Responsible Individual, and Directors to ensure the agency runs efficiently and effectively.

Your responsibilities will include:

Leading business and administrative functions across HR, finance, IT, facilities, and compliance
Supporting fostering panel processes, including minute-taking and coordination
Managing HR processes, safer recruitment, and employee records
Processing payroll and financial administration (including foster carer payments)
Overseeing office operations, meetings, and training coordination
Acting as a key point of contact for stakeholders, carers, and external partners
Supervising the Office Administrator
Supporting social workers with essential administrative tasks
What We’re Looking For:

Proven experience in a business or senior administrative role
Strong knowledge of Microsoft 365 (Outlook, Word, Excel, Teams)
Experience with payroll systems (e.g. SAGE)
HR background or experience (desirable)
Excellent organisational skills and attention to detail
Confident communicator with a professional and empathetic approach
A proactive, “can-do” attitude with the ability to work independently and as part of a team
Degree-level education (desirable)
This role is subject to an enhanced DBS check and safer recruitment procedures.

Full-time or part-time considered.

Send your CV and a covering letter outlining what you can bring to the team to:
cratcliffe@evergreenfostercare.co.uk

Job Types: Full-time, Permanent

Pay: £40,000.00-£45,000.00 per year

Benefits:

Company pension
On-site parking
Work Location: In person

personalisedContent.roleNeedsSummary: My reading of this role is that it needs someone who can hold the business side together without needing constant direction. The priorities look to be reliable administration, strong coordination, careful handling of payroll and records, and enough judgement to support senior leaders, carers and social workers in a professional way.

experienceMappings.relevance: This shows I can support leaders with the kind of organised back-office control this role needs.

experienceMappings.myEvidence: In NHS primary care I built reporting across payroll and contractual income, and I also supported reconciliation work across a significant income base.
experienceMappings.relevance: That is directly relevant to a role that includes payroll processing and carer payment administration.

experienceMappings.myEvidence: I’ve worked in structured environments where process, confidentiality and team coordination mattered, and I’ve supported training and workload allocation within a 12-person function.
experienceMappings.relevance: That gives me a good base for handling records, process discipline and people-related administration.

experienceMappings.relevance: The role asks for strong Microsoft 365 skills, and I’m used to working in detail-heavy environments where those tools matter.

experienceMappings.relevance: That shows I understand the value of clear process, traceability and doing things properly in a regulated setting.

experienceMappings.roleNeed: Supporting a small team and supervising office administration
experienceMappings.myEvidence: I’ve led day-to-day operations in busy settings where I had to coordinate people, priorities and delivery standards.
experienceMappings.relevance: That experience translates well to supporting an office administrator and keeping the office function steady.

focusAreasToBring.title: Operational control
focusAreasToBring.summary: I would focus on making sure the business side is organised, visible and dependable, so senior leaders can rely on the information and the process behind it.

focusAreasToBring.title: Payroll and records
focusAreasToBring.summary: I would treat payroll, employee records and carer payments as control points, with careful checking and clear ownership.

focusAreasToBring.title: Practical coordination
focusAreasToBring.summary: I would keep meetings, panel support, training and office administration moving in a simple, disciplined way, so people can get on with the work around me.

personalisedContent.fitSummary: I bring senior operational experience, strong reporting discipline and a track record of improving how busy teams run. I’ve worked in regulated and service-led environments where accuracy, pace and judgement all matter, which makes this role feel like a strong fit for how I work.
personalisedContent.likelyContributionSummary: Based on what the brief describes, I would expect to spend the first months tightening the day-to-day running of the business side, getting a clear grip on processes, records and reporting. I’d also look to make payroll, HR administration, panel support and office coordination more consistent, so the senior team has a steadier base to work from.
companyHighlights: Evergreen Foster Care describes itself as a growing fostering agency.
The organisation says its work is purpose-led and focused on improving outcomes for children and families.
The role sits in Stoke-on-Trent and is based in person.
personalisedContent.cultureFitSummary: I work best in environments that need ownership, pace and a steady hand. The brief suggests a professional, can-do setting where detail matters, and that matches the way I like to operate.

first90DaysPlan.detail: I would get close to the current processes, people and systems across HR, payroll, compliance, office administration and panel support, so I can see where control is strong and where it needs tightening.
I would focus on the recurring work that keeps the agency moving: records, payroll, meeting coordination, panel administration and support for senior leaders and the office function.
I would look for practical ways to make the business side easier to run, with clearer ownership, better reporting and fewer avoidable handoffs across the team.

personalisedContent.closingSummary: I would bring calm, structure and dependable follow-through to the business side of Evergreen Foster Care.
closingProofPoints: I’ve built reporting across workflow, payroll and income in NHS primary care.
I’ve helped a growing business improve margin, orders won and operational resilience.
I’ve created a compliance tracking system in a safety-critical environment.
contentNotes: I have kept company highlights limited to facts stated in the advert.
I have not claimed direct HR or payroll system ownership beyond what is supported by the CV; I’ve framed those areas through adjacent operational and reporting experience.
Evidence selection favours operational control, reporting and regulated-environment experience because that is the strongest match to the brief.
